reasoning: As of late November 2025 (Week 11/12), the Philadelphia Eagles are currently the favorites to win Super Bowl LX. According to a November 21st article from The Athletic, following a Sunday night victory, their odds improved to +550, moving them slightly ahead of the Kansas City Chiefs and Los Angeles Rams (+600). Betting odds of +550 imply a probability of 15.38%. When removing the typical sportsbook vigorish (or overround) found in futures markets, the true probability adjusts downward by roughly a proportional amount depending on the total market margin, placing the true probability around 13-14%. This aligns nicely with the earlier Manifold market price of 15% from mid-November before adjustments. Therefore, a 14% chance accurately reflects the Eagles' current position as the top contenders in a competitive NFL field.
